entity_candidates.definition: La prima notte di quiete is the Italian title of the 1972 psychological romantic drama film "Indian Summer", co‑written and directed by Valerio Zurlini and starring Alain Delon, Sonia Petrovna, Renato Salvatori, Alida Valli, Adalberto Maria Merli, Salvo Randone and Lea Massari.
